feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Communication arrangement in SAP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are facing connection issue while creating communication arrangement in SAP,

issue: SOAP:1032 SRT: Wrong Content-Type and empty HTTP-B ody received: ("HTTP Code 401 : Unauthorized")

we tried changing user ID and password but it's still the same.

 Please suggest us on how to solve this error.

Regards

Pranavi Reddy

entry.title: Convert Integer to Hexadecimal
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hope you're having a good day!
Just wanted to ask how do you convert an integer to hexadecimal?
Currently I have this line of code.

DATA(lt_tabix) = sy-tabix.

which is then used to compare a hexadecimal value.

LOOP AT lt_table ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_var>) WHERE hex = lt_tabix

It will give me an error since 10 is not 0000000000000010 in hexa.
Really appreciate your replies in advance.

entry.title: Long text not reflecting in IW33
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using a bdc program for IW36 to create an order. Once the order is created, I am using fm SAVE_TEXT to update long text. When I go to IW33, my long text is truncated to 40 characters. But in SE37, fm READ_TEXT is returning me the long text. Can anyone tell me why I am unable to see the long text in IW33? I can see lt_otext contains 6 lines. Below is my code for reference.

          ls_oheader-tdid = 'KOPF'.
          ls_oheader-tdobject = 'AUFK'.
          lv_suborder = |{ lv_suborder ALPHA = IN }|.
          ls_oheader-tdname = |{ sy-mandt }{ lv_suborder }|.
          ls_oheader-tdspras = sy-langu.
          ls_oheader-tdform = 'SYSTEM'.
          ls_oheader-tdlinesize = 072.
          ls_oheader-tdtxtlines = lv_count.

          CALL FUNCTION 'SAVE_TEXT'
            EXPORTING
              client          = sy-mandt
              header          = ls_oheader
*              insert          = 'X'
              savemode_direct = 'X'
*             keep_last_changed = abap_true
            TABLES
              lines           = lt_otext
            EXCEPTIONS
              id              = 1
              language        = 2
              name            = 3
              object          = 4
              OTHERS          = 5.
          IF sy-subrc = 0.
            COMMIT WORK.
          ENDIF.

Thanks,

BK

entry.title: Excel file generated via xco_cp_xlsx is not opening when sent over Email
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to generate a excel with the help of xco_cp_xlsx and attached to email. But when trying the access the attachment in Email getting the below error and unable to open the excel.

 

Code Snippet:

TRY.

DATA(lo_write_access) = xco_cp_xlsx=>document->empty( )->write_access( ).

DATA(lo_worksheet) = lo_write_access->get_workbook( )->worksheet->at_position( 1 ).

DATA(lo_cursor) = lo_worksheet->cursor(
io_column = xco_cp_xlsx=>coordinate->for_alphabetic_value( 'A' )
io_row = xco_cp_xlsx=>coordinate->for_numeric_value( 1 )
).

lo_cursor->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'PO Number' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'PO Item' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Material' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Net Price' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Qty Requested' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Percent Complete' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Gross Amount' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Amount to Accrue' ).


DATA(lo_selection_pattern) = xco_cp_xlsx_selection=>pattern_builder->simple_from_to(
)->from_column( xco_cp_xlsx=>coordinate->for_alphabetic_value( 'A' )
)->from_row( xco_cp_xlsx=>coordinate->for_numeric_value( 2 )
)->get_pattern( ).

lo_worksheet->select( lo_selection_pattern
)->row_stream(
)->operation->write_from( REF #( lt_purchase_orders )
)->set_value_transformation( xco_cp_xlsx_write_access=>value_transformation->best_effort
)->execute( ).

DATA(lv_file_content) = lo_write_access->get_file_content( ).

lv_email_subject = 'Accrual Report for PO Items to be Posted for Current Month'.

DATA(lv_sender_email) = 'dummy@email.com'.
lv_recipient = 'dummy@email.com'.

DATA(lo_mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).


lo_mail->set_sender( CONV #( lv_sender_email ) ).
lo_mail->add_recipient( CONV #( lv_recipient ) ).
lo_mail->set_subject( CONV #( lv_email_subject ) ).

DATA(lv_content) = |<h1 style="font-family:Helvetica;color:#000000;">Posting Data for the current Month</h1>| &
|<p style="font-family:Helvetica;font-size:14px;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;color:#000000;">Dear Team,<br/><br/>| &
|Please check the attached file for the Purchase Order to be posting in the current month.

lo_mail->set_main( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
iv_content = lv_content
iv_content_type = 'text/html'
) ).


lo_mail->add_attachment( cl_bcs_mail_binarypart=>create_instance(
iv_content = lv_file_content
iv_content_type = 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'
iv_filename = 'Posting Document.xlsx'
) ).
lo_mail->send( ).

This I am trying to achieve in S/4 HANA 2023. Please let me know if you have any pointer to resolve this issue.

Regards,

Guru

entry.title: Inner join with AND , OR and LIKE in where clause select query
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

               When I am using the multiple OR clauses in where condition for individual tables it is working fine but when using the multiple OR  clauses with inner join in where clause it is only considering the first condition. 

The following is the code which helps you understand better.

 

    if lt_bsad is not initial.
      select rbukrs,
             gjahr,
             belnr,
             wsl,
             augbl,
             gkont from acdoca into table @LT_acdoca
        for all entries in @LT_bsad where rbukrs = @LT_bsad-bukrs and
                                          gjahr  = @LT_bsad-gjahr and
                                          augbl  = @LT_bsad-augbl and
                                          rldnr  = '0L'.

    endif.

    if lt_acdoca is not initial.
      select spras,
             saknr,
             txt50 from skat into table @DATA(lt_skat)
        for all entries in @LT_acdoca where saknr = @LT_acdoca-gkont and
                                            txt50 like '%TDS%' or
                                            txt50 like '%CASH DISCOUNT%' or
                                            txt50 like '%GBI%' or
                                            txt50 like '%CUF%' and
                                            spras = 'E'.
    endif.

 The above code is picking 6 records each in lt_acdoca and lt_skat which is absolutely correct. 
But I want to get the inner join of both acdoca and skat so that I can pick the acdoca-wsl from acdoca to pass it in final internal table based on txt50 as shown above.
The below is the select query with inner join of the above two tables.

    select acdoca~rbukrs,
           acdoca~gjahr,
           acdoca~belnr,
           acdoca~wsl,
           acdoca~augbl,
           acdoca~gkont,
           skat~spras,
           skat~saknr,
           skat~txt50
         from acdoca as acdoca inner join skat as skat
     on skat~saknr = acdoca~gkont
      into table @DATA(lt_acdoca_skat)
    for all entries in @LT_bsad where  acdoca~rbukrs = @LT_bsad-bukrs and
                                        acdoca~gjahr  = @LT_bsad-gjahr and
                                        acdoca~augbl  = @LT_bsad-augbl and
                                        acdoca~rldnr  = '0L' and
                                        skat~spras = 'E' and
                                        ( skat~txt50 like '%TDS%' or
                                          skat~txt50 like '%CASH DISCOUNT%' 
                                                                     or
                                         skat~txt50 like '%GBI%' or
                                          skat~txt50 like '%CUF%'
                                         ).
*

Now it is giving the result with 'TDS' only . But I want the lt_acdoca_skat with 'GBI' , 'CUF', 'CASH DISCOUNT' also.

The below is the image of 6 records in lt_skat

The below is the one record with the TDS. So it is taking the first condition of TDS and skipping the others.

I want the lt_acdoca_skat with all 6 records of lt_acdoca and lt_skat .

How can I achieve it  ?

entry.title: Invalid char # replacement
entry.content:
I am retrieving some binary data from a table, decompressing and then converting to string with code page 0160, but I have issues with accented characters as it does not get recognized. Have tried multiple codepages (present in TCP00) but without any luck. 


Is there any workaround for this?

 

TRY.
    cl_abap_gzip=>decompress_binary(
      EXPORTING
        gzip_in     = lv_xstring
        gzip_in_len = -1
      IMPORTING
        raw_out     = lv_xstring
    ).

  CATCH cx_parameter_invalid_range.
  CATCH cx_sy_buffer_overflow.
  CATCH cx_sy_compression_error.
ENDTRY.

DATA(rv_data) = cl_bcs_convert=>xstring_to_string(
  iv_xstr = lv_xstring
  iv_cp   = '0120' ).

entry.title: Optimized Approach to Count Empty Cells in Each Column of a Large Table in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I need to count the number of empty cells in each column of a table (e.g., a table with 3 columns and 3 records) and display the results in a work area with the table structure. However, the challenge I’m facing is that my production system contains a massive database with 300 crore (3 billion) records. Using SELECT COUNT(*) for each column separately causes severe performance degradation.

What I've Tried:

I have tried using separate SELECT COUNT(*) queries for each of the 3 columns. For example, for 3 columns, I’m running 3 queries like this:

 

The Question:

Is there a more efficient way to count the number of empty cells in each column of a large table without degrading performance? I want to avoid running multiple queries and ideally execute everything in a single query or optimized batch. Also, I need to store the results in a work area with the table structure so I can easily display the counts for each column.

entry.title: Single Persistent Table for Two Different Entities in SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hi All,


I need an expert advice on a Data Modeling that I am working for a RAP-based Fiori Application. Let me explain the scenario. I have a parent database table ZDEMO_PARENT and a child database table ZDEMO_CHILD. I have to handle data stored in child table in two different ways. So I am creating two entities for the child table. But in my behavior definition, if I give same persistent table (ZDEMO_CHILD) for both entities, it will result in runtime error trying to insert duplicate key entry into the child database table as both the entities will have same keys obviously.

How do we efficiently handle this to prevent the runtime error? Managed Implementation with Unmanaged Save is one way to avoid it but do we have any other way to do it with managed save as well? 

@SAPSupport 

@Andre_Fischer

 Thanks

Swetha

entry.title: CDS View for Parked G/L Line items in Vendor/Supplier Invoice
entry.content:
I_SuplrInvoiceItemGLAcctAPI01 is the cds view for G/L Line items in a Parked Vendor/Supplier Invoice , RBCO is the database table.

VBSEGK Stores only vendor line item data.

BSEG , ACDOCA , RBKP stores data of the invoice only once it's posted.

entry.title: How to use MessageModel for SmartTable Odata Requests
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a Smarttable in which the user can edit and save the data. Communication takes place via Odata. I would like to receive errors from the backend (SEGW) via the message model. So that I don't have to check the response of the request myself.

MessageModel is bound to the EntitySet, as is the table.

The binding is set to the MessageModel but At the moment I always get the error message “Error parsing OData messages: TypeError: i.checkUpdate is not a function” in the ODataMessageParser. 
 
Any idea what I am doing wrong?

entry.title: Issue with Passing FREE SELECTIONS in SUBMIT Without VIA SELECTION-SCREEN
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working on an SAP ABAP program where I need to pass dynamic profit center values (PRCTR) to a report using FREE SELECTIONS. Below is a snippet of my code:

LOOP AT s_values INTO lv_prctr_value.
trange_line-tablename = 'FAGLFREESEL'.
trange_frange_t_line-fieldname = 'PRCTR'.
trange_frange_t_selopt_t_line-sign = 'I'.
trange_frange_t_selopt_t_line-option = 'EQ'.
trange_frange_t_selopt_t_line-low = lv_prctr_value.
IF lv_prctr_value IS NOT INITIAL.
APPEND trange_frange_t_selopt_t_line TO trange_frange_t_line-selopt_t.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

APPEND trange_frange_t_line TO trange_line-frange_t.
APPEND trange_line TO trange.

CALL FUNCTION 'FREE_SELECTIONS_RANGE_2_EX'
EXPORTING
field_ranges = trange
IMPORTING
expressions = texpr.

SUBMIT ZTEST017 "VIA SELECTION-SCREEN 
WITH SELECTION-TABLE rspar_tab
WITH B-MONATE BETWEEN lv_num AND lv_bilabmon
WITH B-MONATE IN range_tab
WITH V-MONATE BETWEEN lv_num AND lv_bilabmon
WITH V-MONATE IN range_tab
WITH FREE SELECTIONS texpr
  EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY
  AND RETURN.




The Problem:

When I execute the program with the VIA SELECTION-SCREEN option in the SUBMIT command, my custom profit center (PRCTR) values are passed correctly, and I get the desired report output. However, when I execute the program without VIA SELECTION-SCREEN, the report generates output for all profit centers instead of just my custom values.

What I’ve Tried:

  • Verified that teexpr contains the correct values for the FREE SELECTIONS.
  • Used VIA SELECTION-SCREEN, which works but requires manual user interaction.
  • Attempted to directly pass the profit center values without the selection screen, but they are ignored.

My Requirement:

I need the report to honor the custom FREE SELECTIONS for the profit center (PRCTR) even when the program is run without the VIA SELECTION-SCREEN option.

Question:

How can I ensure that my custom FREE SELECTIONS for PRCTR are correctly passed to the report in the SUBMIT command when running the program without VIA SELECTION-SCREEN?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Question regarding Data Source Integration in Content Form Templates
entry.content:
Is it possible to include data from 'View Browser' and custom CDS Views as data sources in Content Form Templates for displaying on forms/documents?
(It's acceptable to follow the flow: Table Data → Custom Logic → Form Data Source)
If possible, please explain the scope of what can be developed.

I will describe the specific requirements and questions below. 

Requirements:

  • Need to detect and print "Reprinted" on documents when they are reprinted
  • Need to detect and print modified areas on documents when they are changed

 

Question: "In the on-premise SAP system, it's possible to:

  1. Print 'Reprinted' on documents using records from NAST (Output Management Table)
  2. Print modified areas on documents using records from CDHDR (Change Document Header Table)

 

How can we utilize these records for document printing in the SAP Public Cloud version?"

Thank you.

entry.title: Not possible to Assign a Source of Supply
entry.content:
I am getting a Warning message no: ME123, " Supplying and receiving plants identical (please check)" While I am trying to assign source of supply, in Source of supply Tab.

This is only a warning message yet it still doesn't assign the source of supply. 

I maintained

1. Source list

2. Info record with the same vendor and Material combination.

3. I have ticked the source list under purchasing tab in the master data.

The supply plant and plant in our case is the same, but I need it to allow me to assign the source of supply. 

Please explain me the problem

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Error Message Type 'W' gets handled as 'I' in BADI
entry.content:
Hello together,

i am using the BADI SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE and its working almost perfect.

I make a check for the credit limit when removing the deliveryblock. And i want to give out the message as a Warning when the credit limit is exceeded. I tried out the Messagetype 'E' and it displayed me an Error Message like it should and i could not save the salesorder. But in my case i got 'W' in there and i get the Message as Info and it gets saved automatically before asking.

Does anyone know the solution?

Best regards

Filip

entry.title: S4HPC Sending Mails Using SMTP CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE Email does not arrived
entry.content:
Hi.

My problem is the following. 

I am in S4HANA Public Cloud using Embedded Extensibility want to sent email with binary attachment. 

I do it along to the following documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/8d1f989deca1455dabc3d81b433fbdaf.html

My code is below. 

    TRY.
        DATA(lo_mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).
        lo_mail->set_sender( 'dummy1@sap.com' ).
        lo_mail->add_recipient( 'dummy2@sap.com' ).
        lo_mail->set_subject( 'Test Mail' ).
        lo_mail->set_main( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_text_html( '<h1>Hello</h1><p>This is a test mail.</p>' ) ).
        lo_mail->add_attachment( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_text_plain(
          iv_content      = 'This is a text attachment'
          iv_filename     = 'Text_Attachment.txt'
        ) ).
        lo_mail->add_attachment( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
          iv_content      = '<note><to>John</to><from>Jane</from><body>My nice XML!</body></note>'
          iv_content_type = 'text/xml'
          iv_filename     = 'Text_Attachment.xml'
        ) ).

        DATA(lo_mail_status_monitor) = lo_mail->send( ).

        lo_mail_status_monitor->get_email_status(
          IMPORTING
            es_mail_status         = DATA(ls_mail_status)
            et_recipients_statuses = DATA(lt_recipients_statuses) ).

        "handle exceptions here
      CATCH cx_bcs_mail INTO DATA(lx_mail).
    ENDTRY.
    COMMIT WORK.

I receive successful email sending status.

Email Monitor says email is delivered.

But message does not arrive my mailbox. 

It looks everything is fine, but eventually it does not work 

Does anybody can support me here?

Thanks

Vitali

entry.title: icm http log and web dispatcher output with delimiter
entry.content:
Hi

Our icm/HTTP/logging logformat is 

 LOGFORMAT=%t %а %u "%r" %s %b %Lms %{Host}i %P %w1 %w2%y1 %у2 %h %h0 %h1 


When exporting the logs from the Web Dispatcher, the txt file extracts are not easily analysed as there's hundreds of thousands of logs records with various log structures which do not parse into consistent columns for review (I'm looking at approx 400k log record lines).

Is it possible to introduce a delimiter to the logformat, like pipe |, to separate the parameter outputs ?  

or is there a better alternative to view the specific http logs ?  
I need to identify IP addresses for all "trusted" log entries.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: IAS to SAC: User Updates Not Provisioned
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have provisioned users from IAS to SAC.

However, when I change a user in IAS (e.g., updating the last name) and run the Read job, the changes are not provisioned to the target system (SAC).

There is no error, but the users are read, and no update is performed in the target system.

What should I pay attention to and what needs to be configured to ensure that only the user changes are successfully provisioned?

 

Many Thanks

Best regard

entry.title: ME52N closed document going in editable mode BAPI_REQUISITION_DELETE
entry.content:
Hi gurus, The query is why the user is able to make changes once the PR is in closed status ?
User is expecting to get the delete indicator and closed indicator to be checked for the PR
created 45 days.

There is custom program and BAPI_REQUISITION_DELETE is used to delete and close the items.
The following is the code ::

 data lv_date1 type datum.
  data lv_date2 type datum.

  call function 'RP_CALC_DATE_IN_INTERVAL'
    exporting
      date      = sy-datum
      days      = '46'
      months    = '00'
      signum    = '-'
      years     = '00'
    importing
      calc_date = lv_date1.

  call function 'RP_CALC_DATE_IN_INTERVAL'
    exporting
      date      = sy-datum
      days      = '00'
      months    = '06'
      signum    = '-'
      years     = '00'
    importing
      calc_date = lv_date2.


  if lv_date1 is not initial.
    select banfn, bnfpo from eban
      into table @DATA(lt_eban)
      where badat le @LV_date1
      and   frgkz IN ('C', 'D')
      and loekz NE 'X'.
  endif.

*  if lv_date2 is not initial.
*    select banfn, bnfpo from eban
*      appending table @LT_eban
*      where badat le @LV_date2
*      and   frgkz = 'A'
*      and   statu = 'N'.
*  endif.


  if lt_eban is not initial.

    data lt_items type table of bapieband.
    data ls_items type bapieband.
    data(lt_head) = lt_eban[].
    data lt_ret type table of bapireturn.
    data ls_log type zmm_pr_del_log.

    sort lt_head by banfn.
    delete adjacent duplicates from lt_head comparing all fields.

    loop at lt_head into data(ls_head).
      refresh lt_items[].
      refresh lt_ret[].

      loop at lt_eban into data(ls_eban) where banfn = ls_head-banfn.
        ls_items-preq_item = ls_eban-bnfpo.
        ls_items-delete_ind = 'X'.
        ls_items-closed     = 'X'.    "PASHA 17/10/2024
        append ls_items to lt_items.
        clear ls_items.
      endloop.

      call function 'BAPI_REQUISITION_DELETE'
        exporting
          number                      = ls_head-banfn
        tables
          requisition_items_to_delete = lt_items
          return                      = lt_ret.

      read table lt_ret into data(ls_ret) with key type = 'E'.
      if sy-subrc = 0.
        ls_log-banfn = ls_head-banfn.
        loop at lt_items into ls_items.
          ls_log-bnfpo = ls_items-preq_item.
          ls_log-message = ls_ret-message.
          ls_log-zdate = sy-datum.
          ls_log-uzeit = sy-uzeit.
          ls_log-uname = sy-uname.
          ls_log-status = 'E'.
          modify zmm_pr_del_log from ls_log.
        endloop.
        clear ls_log.
      else.
        ls_log-banfn = ls_head-banfn.
        loop at lt_items into ls_items.
          ls_log-bnfpo = ls_items-preq_item.
          ls_log-message = ls_ret-message.
          ls_log-zdate = sy-datum.
          ls_log-uzeit = sy-uzeit.
          ls_log-uname = sy-uname.
          ls_log-status = 'S'.
          modify zmm_pr_del_log from ls_log.
        endloop.
        clear ls_log.
      endif.


    endloop.

  endif.

I have observed two scenarios at me52n once this code gets executed.

for EBAN-ESTKG (PRODUCTION ORDER(F)) it is giving me the expected result which is not editable after
running the above code.

However ,

For all other scenarios other than production order it is going in editable mode after running through the same above code like below

Strange thing is that in the first scenario closed is not ticked but it was non editable , in the second one closed is ticked but i can able to undelete and make changes.


My question is why it is working fine in PRODUCTION ORDER case but not in other cases though
the code is same.

The requirement is once the code is executed it should be non editable for all documents based on the select query in the code.

Is it that needs to be fixed from functional end or is it SAP's glitch as it is making
item number editable after the PR is closed.

Thank in advance for your replies

entry.title: How to fill item navigation property of standard API to create Supplier Invoice in S4 HANA CLoud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working in S4 HANA public cloud and my requirement is to create Supplier Invoice by passing header data and navigation property "to_SelectedServiceEntrySheets" of API "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SUPPLIERINVOICE_PROCESS_SRV/A_SupplierInvoice".

I have created service consumption model for this API in eclipse. But, in the CREATE operation of consumption model no code generated to navigate to "to_SelectedServiceEntrySheets" as I need to supply two fields here "ServiceEntrysheet" and ServiceEntryItem" as this is mandatory to POST supplier invoice.

I have successfully supplied the header data and when I execute the code, I am getting message "No Item data supplied to post invoice". This is because above navigation property is not supplied in the payload.

Kindly suggest how I can supply the data into "to_SelectedServiceEntrySheets" of this API.

I have attached my code for reference.

Many Thanks In advance!

entry.title: Urgent help - SAP Standard BAPI/FM to update LIPS-MBDAT - Staging date of a delivery item
entry.content:
Hi Experts, ABAP Development 

Is any FM/BAPI is there to update staging date(LIPS-MBDAT) of a delivery at item level?

I have seen many links with similar question but there is no answer posted.

 I tried with WB2_PROCESS_DL_ITEM_CHANGE and WB2_ADD_ON_CHANGE_DL but nothing is worked.

I dont want to go with BDC or direct table updates. Please let me know if there is any other way to update this field.
